question_text: A block of ice melts to form water. Which statement correctly describes what happens to the particles during melting?

options.label: A
options.text: Particles break apart into smaller pieces

options.label: B
options.text: Particles gain energy and break free from their fixed positions, but remain closely packed

options.label: D
options.text: New particles are created as the ice melts

explanation: During melting, particles gain thermal energy and vibrate so vigorously that they escape their fixed positions in the solid. However, they remain close together as in a liquid, without creating or destroying particles.
